description:
【DIY COMPARTMENT】- - There are three removable padded dividers with velcro in the bottom of the cable case, you can DIY them to separate the one bottom space into several compartments, fitting accessories of different sizes, and keeping all your electronic accessories in order.

【PREMIUM QUALITY】 - - This travel cable organizer is made of waterproof cation 300D fabric and thick padded inner material. Newly improved double zippers with plane design are more smooth and durable. Superior & neat stitching makes the electronic organizer case exquisite and unique.

【NO MORE MESSY】 - - The cord travel case has compact pockets to keep everything organized well. Except for 3 detachable dividers, there are 5 mesh pockets with elastic loops for slender cables, earphones, pens, etc., to prevent cables from getting entangled.

【TRAVEL PARTNER】 - - the ideal size makes the travel electronic organizer easy to fit in your backpack and luggage without taking much space, and a top handle is easy to carry, it is a perfect portable cord case for traveling.

Sturdy & Widened Handle

This travel cable organizer is designed with a widened handle, you can take it with you no matter you are at office, travelling or going on a business trip.

Double-way Zippers

Double-way zippers are more convenient for you to fetch electronic accessories than single zipper. Quality Anti-slip zippers are more smooth and durable than normal zippers.

Waterproof Cation Fabric

This accessory case is made of cation fabric, which is waterproof and durable, protecting your electronics against scratches, dust, impacts and accidental dropping.

Exquisite Mesh Pockets

This travel cord bag including five premium mesh pockets with neat stitching and compact layout. You can store your cords, earphones, pens, usb, sd cards in order. Visual mesh design for quick access and management.

Premium Elastic Loops

This large electronic accessory case is also designed with 5 elastic loops to match the 5 mesh pockets, which can keep your cords, earphones, pens fixed better.

Soft & Thicken Lining

This big electronic bag is made of soft and thicken partial main lining, which can effectively protect your electronic charger, power bank, cords etc securely.
